title: lastrea nitens
intro: Lastrea nitens, also known as the shining lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lastrea nitens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
